episodes.title: The Apostolic Church: My Experience with Cult-Like Control
episodes.description:
#digitalart #procreateart #art #storytime 

Today, I’m discussing with you what apostolic Pentecostalism is and how I experienced it from my perspective. I’ll explain why I thought it was a cult. 

Disclaimer: The views, opinions, and beliefs expressed in this video are those of the author(s) and do not necessarily reflect the official policy or position of any religious organization, institution, or group. This content is intended for educational, informational, and discussion purposes only and is not meant to demean, stereotype, or incite hatred against any religious group, denomination, or individual. Viewer discretion is advised.


My Penecostal Experience: Why I left and My Advice https://youtu.be/ap5werHta_U
